title: Count Employees per Department
description: Find the number of employees in each department. Return department name and the count, with the column alias 'total'.
reference_query: SELECT department, COUNT(*) AS total FROM employees GROUP BY department
hints: Use GROUP BY to group rows by a column.
COUNT(*) counts all rows in each group.
Use AS to name the count column 'total'.
explanation: GROUP BY groups rows with the same value together. Aggregate functions like COUNT(), SUM(), AVG() then operate on each group.
